context: Tests whether the agent correctly configures PyXLL to load multiple ribbon files, uses shared tab IDs for merging, and applies PyXLL-specific insertBefore/insertAfter ordering attributes with the correct semantics.

checklist.name: Multi-file config syntax
checklist.description: pyxll.cfg lists both XML files under the ribbon key using comma-separated or newline-indented syntax (not just a single path, and not a space-separated list on one line)

checklist.name: Shared tab ID for merge
checklist.description: Both XML files declare a <tab> element with the same id attribute value, triggering PyXLL's merge behaviour rather than creating two separate tabs

checklist.name: insertBefore or insertAfter used
checklist.description: The Reporting group element has an insertBefore or insertAfter attribute to control its position relative to the Data Science groups

checklist.name: Merge attribute value is a custom ID
checklist.description: The value of insertBefore or insertAfter is a custom id string that matches a group defined in data_ribbon.xml — NOT an idMso value (built-in Office identifiers do not start with lowercase letters and are camelCase)

checklist.name: Only one merge attribute per element
checklist.description: No single element has both insertBefore and insertAfter attributes set simultaneously

checklist.name: module.function callbacks
checklist.description: All onAction (and any other callback) attribute values use module.function format — i.e. contain exactly one dot with a non-empty module name before it (e.g. ds_tools.on_prepare, not just on_prepare)

checklist.name: Unique IDs within each file
checklist.description: All custom id attribute values within data_ribbon.xml are unique; same for report_ribbon.xml
